title: Wheel Deals
description: A high-scale, premium automotive marketplace ecosystem featuring a React Native mobile app, a secure Spring Boot backend, and cloud-native DevOps infrastructure. Originally developed as AutoTradeX and refined into the enterprise-grade Wheel Deals platform.
features: FRONTEND: Built a premium React Native mobile app with real-time dealer-user chat, advanced car filters, and secure image/video gallery (up to 500MB).
BACKEND: Architected a scalable Spring Boot API handling 5,000+ active users, managing complex vehicle inventories, pricing engines, and transaction workflows.
DEVOPS: Implemented automated CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions and managed production-ready VPS infrastructure on AWS with custom firewalls and rate-limiting.
PERFORMANCE: Achieved <200ms API response times using Redis caching and optimized media processing pipes, reducing upload latency by 35%.
SECURITY: Integrated JWT-based authentication, secure dealer verification flows, and enterprise-grade data protection.

title: Duplicate File Analyzer
description: A tool for analyzing duplicate files on a computer using Python.
features: Alerts and notifications of duplicate files
recommend before downloading

Support Distrbuted Storage

title: NetScan Pro - Network Analyzer
description: A comprehensive network analysis tool for monitoring, scanning, and troubleshooting network infrastructure with real-time insights.
features: Network discovery and device fingerprinting
Port scanning and service detection
Network traffic analysis and monitoring
Bandwidth usage tracking
Security vulnerability scanning
Interactive network topology mapping
Custom scan scheduling and reporting

title: Campus Surveillance - Smart Tracking
description: An intelligent student tracking and face detection system for campus security. Features real-time monitoring, automated attendance/tracking, and high-precision face recognition using computer vision.
features: Real-time student tracking and trajectory analysis across campus corridors
High-precision face detection and recognition for automated authorized access
Automated alert system for unauthorized entry or suspicious behavior
Web-based dashboard for live monitoring and incident reporting
Scalable multi-camera support with real-time video processing

title: KindNet - AI Sentiment Detection
description: An end-to-end deep learning platform designed to detect bullying and toxic speech on social media. Features a sophisticated NLP model for real-time sentiment analysis and a sleek monitoring dashboard.
features: Developed a custom Deep Learning model for text classification and sentiment analysis
Built a real-time monitoring dashboard to visualize toxicity trends
Implemented a secure REST API for backend-model communication
Optimized NLP pipeline for low-latency inference on social media streams
Multi-repository architecture spanning specialized ML backend and React frontend

title: AutoSMS - Automated Mailer
description: A high-utility Android application built for automated SMS broadcasting and message scheduling, streamlining bulk communication workflows.
features: Automated bulk SMS broadcasting with template support
Scheduled messaging system for delayed delivery
Contact group management with SQLite persistent storage
Real-time delivery status tracking and logging
Clean Material Design UI for intuitive campaign management

title: Finance Management using AI
description: A tool for managing finance using AI.
